---
title: "Track A (multi-ROI): Build QC-safe two-wave dataset + age timeline"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
This step creates a QC-safe two-wave dataset for multi-ROI analyses and adds an explicit **age timeline**:
- `Age0` (baseline age)
- `Age_TP` (age at assessment: Age0 + followup_years × time_point)
- `Age_mid` (midpoint age: Age0 + followup_years/2)

It also:
- enforces exactly T1+T2 per participant,
- collapses duplicates within ID×wave if present,
- computes bilateral ROI means,
- reshapes ROIs to a long dimension (`ROI_name`, `ROI_value`) for scalable multi-ROI loops.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "simulate_toy_data_multiROI.R"))
source(here::here("R", "qc_two_wave_long_multiROI.R"))
source(here::here("R", "reshape_multiROI.R"))

out_dir <- here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---- 1) Load toy data (multi-ROI) ----
# Toy wide long data columns:
# ID, wave (T1/T2), Age0, Sex, Y,
# ROI_A_L, ROI_A_R, ROI_B_L, ROI_B_R, ROI_C_L, ROI_C_R
df_long <- simulate_toy_two_wave_long_multiROI(n_id = 120, followup_years = 4)

# ---- 2) QC + age timeline ----
qc <- build_qc_two_wave_multiROI(
  df_long = df_long,
  id_col = "ID",
  wave_col = "wave",
  wave_map = c("T1" = 0L, "T2" = 1L),
  baseline_age_col = "Age0",
  sex_col = "Sex",
  outcome_col = "Y",
  followup_years = 4,
  collapse_duplicates = TRUE
)

dat_long_core <- qc$dat_long_core  # QC-safe, 2 waves per ID, includes Age timeline

# ---- 3) Reshape ROIs to long ROI dimension ----
dat_roi_long <- reshape_rois_to_long(
  dat_long = dat_long_core,
  roi_pairs = list(
    ROI_A = c("ROI_A_L", "ROI_A_R"),
    ROI_B = c("ROI_B_L", "ROI_B_R"),
    ROI_C = c("ROI_C_L", "ROI_C_R")
  ),
  require_both_sides = TRUE
)

# ---- 4) Save ----
saveRDS(dat_long_core, file.path(out_dir, "dat_long_core_qc_ageTimeline.rds"))
saveRDS(dat_roi_long,  file.path(out_dir, "dat_roi_long_qc_ageTimeline.rds"))

write_csv(qc$qc_summary, file.path(out_dir, "qc_summary.csv"))
write_csv(qc$dropped_rows, file.path(out_dir, "dropped_rows.csv"))
write_csv(qc$dup_inconsistency, file.path(out_dir, "dup_inconsistency.csv"))

# Quick peek
qc$qc_summary
head(dat_roi_long)
```
